name: the-web-conference-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for The ACM Web Conference (WWW): topic and track selection, research-tracks submission audits, rebuttal drafting, ACM camera-ready and TAPS, artifact badging, web-data reproducibility, appendix packaging, review-process reasoning, writing style, related work, web-scale experiments, and cycle workflow. Grounded in the WWW 2026 research-tracks CFP, important-dates page, artifact-badging call, ACM DL proceedings records, and SIGWEB announcements checked on 2026-07-08.
